pi_items.source: SARAMIS: Simulation Assets for Robotic Assisted and Minimally Invasive Surgery Supplementary Materials (NeurIPS 2023)

privileged_info_summary: The CT volume is synthetically generated with a gallbladder length of 9.2 cm, a transverse diameter of 4.2 cm, and a wall thickness of 3.8 mm. Standard radiological normal ranges for a gallbladder are length up to 10 cm, transverse diameter up to 4-5 cm, and wall thickness up to 3 mm. Although the task references the AMOS dataset, the standard AMOS label for the gallbladder is 4, whereas the generation script for this task uses label 9.
